title: 为什么中国科技公司竞相在香港设立
originalTitle: Why Chinese tech companies are racing to set up in Hong Kong
summary: 大陆公司正在利用该地区测试产品，并作为全球扩张的跳板。
originalSummary: Mainland firms are using the territory to test products and as a springboard for global expansion.

title: 科技CEO突然喜欢将大规模裁员归咎于人工智能。为什么？
originalTitle: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
summary: 越来越多的技术领导者指出，人工智能工具导致裁员，需要更多的投资现金。
originalSummary: More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

title: 由于全球“压力” ， PS5价格上涨了90 £
originalTitle: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
summary: 这些变化将使PS5的建议零售价从英国的479.99英镑上涨到569.99英镑。
originalSummary: The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.
